title: Physostemon stenophyllus
taxonomy: Physostemon stenophyllus is a plant species within the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine family. This family is part of the larger order Celastrales, a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the Northern Hemisphere. The family Celastraceae is composed of approximately 280 species, with many being deciduous shrubs or small trees. These plants are typically characterized by having simple, alternate leaves and small, often fragrant flowers. Physostemon stenophyllus, like many other Celastraceae species, is native to tropical and subtropical regions.
